title: Strategy (MSTR) Stock Falls Below $100 for First Time Since March 2024
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Strategy (MSTR) Stock Falls Below $100 for First Time Since March 2024

Strategy (MSTR) shares fell below $100 for the first time since March 2024 as Bitcoin's drop to around $61,000 left the company sitting on more than $11 billion in unrealized losses.

This post Strategy (MSTR) Stock Falls Below $100 for First Time Since March 2024 first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Bitcoin Price Crashes Toward $61,000 as Bloodbath Engulfs Crypto Stocks
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin Price Crashes Toward $61,000 as Bloodbath Engulfs Crypto Stocks

Bitcoin price has fallen to around $61,500—down more than 50% from its October 2025 peak—dragging crypto-related stocks even lower in the broader market sell-off.

This post Bitcoin Price Crashes Toward $61,000 as Bloodbath Engulfs Crypto Stocks first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Strive (ASST) CEO Says Company Is Buying Bitcoin ‘Hand Over Fist’ as Treasury Hits 19,864 BTC
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Strive (ASST) CEO Says Company Is Buying Bitcoin ‘Hand Over Fist’ as Treasury Hits 19,864 BTC

Strive CEO Matt Cole said the company is buying Bitcoin “hand over fist” during the market downturn, with its treasury reaching 19,864 BTC.

This post Strive (ASST) CEO Says Company Is Buying Bitcoin ‘Hand Over Fist’ as Treasury Hits 19,864 BTC first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: BlackRock Tells Investors to Put Bitcoin in Their Portfolios
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

BlackRock Tells Investors to Put Bitcoin in Their Portfolios

BlackRock, the world's largest asset manager, recommends a 1–2% Bitcoin allocation in diversified portfolios, arguing it can enhance returns while maintaining manageable risk.

This post BlackRock Tells Investors to Put Bitcoin in Their Portfolios first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Congress Schedules CLARITY Act Hearing for July 17 in New York
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Congress Schedules CLARITY Act Hearing for July 17 in New York

Congress has scheduled a July 17 hearing in New York on the CLARITY Act as momentum builds for the crypto market structure bill.

This post Congress Schedules CLARITY Act Hearing for July 17 in New York first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Craig Raw Built One of Bitcoin’s Best Wallets for Free. Apple Might Kill It by June 30.
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Craig Raw Built One of Bitcoin’s Best Wallets for Free. Apple Might Kill It by June 30.

Apple may terminate Sparrow Wallet creator Craig Raw's developer account on June 30 after he submitted a warning app to combat fake Sparrow Wallet scams.

This post Craig Raw Built One of Bitcoin’s Best Wallets for Free. Apple Might Kill It by June 30. first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.
